VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Mirai
Focus: Racing
 
Seamlessly pairing pilot and pure speed, the Mirai Pulse LX grav-lev bike soars over terrain like no open-canopy racer before. Feel your heartrate quicken as you experience first-hand the Pulse’s ground-breaking responsiveness and form-fitting silhouette.

English.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Mirai
Focus: Racing
 
Seamlessly pairing pilot and pure speed, the Mirai Pulse LX grav-lev bike soars over terrain like no open-canopy racer before. Feel your heartrate quicken as you experience first-hand the Pulse’s ground-breaking responsiveness and form-fitting silhouette.

Localization.Name: Mirai
Localization.Description: The Mirai design team is dedicated to pairing the craftsmanship of their parent company MISC with Xi’an technology and traditional Saisei aesthetics to create the next generation of cutting-edge vehicles.

Localization.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
Localization.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

English.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
English.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

Localization.Name: Radix
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

English.Name: Radix
English.Description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

Localization.Name: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Localization.Description: Subsidiary of RSI, handles a small percentage of their thruster and ship options construction as well as cooling systems.

English.Name: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
English.Description: Subsidiary of RSI, handles a small percentage of their thruster and ship options construction as well as cooling systems.

Localization.Name: Fridan
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

The Fridan is Wen/Cassel Propulsion’s entry-level vehicle cooler. It has proven time and again that it can withstand even the worst environmental conditions, making it an ideal component for your vehicle.

English.Name: Fridan
English.Description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

Localization.Name: Consolidated Outland
Localization.Description: Founded by maverick trillionaire Silas Koerner, Consolidated Outland is an up-and-coming spacecraft concern, the first ever headquartered on a frontier world. Koerner, who made his sizable fortune in jump-communications, founded the company as an attempt to strike back at what he sees as the overly-regulated spacecraft industry. With facilities established as far from possible from the prying eyes of competing corporations, Outland is quickly becoming one to watch.

English.Name: Consolidated Outland
English.Description: Founded by maverick trillionaire Silas Koerner, Consolidated Outland is an up-and-coming spacecraft concern, the first ever headquartered on a frontier world. Koerner, who made his sizable fortune in jump-communications, founded the company as an attempt to strike back at what he sees as the overly-regulated spacecraft industry. With facilities established as far from possible from the prying eyes of competing corporations, Outland is quickly becoming one to watch.

Localization.Name: WillsOp
Localization.Description: WillsOp have products to cover the whole spectrum of electronic analysis from tracking and targeting to scanners and deep-space radar.

English.Name: WillsOp
English.Description: WillsOp have products to cover the whole spectrum of electronic analysis from tracking and targeting to scanners and deep-space radar.

Localization.Name: Denning
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.

English.Description:
Item Type: Radar

Localization.Description: Though many attributed their elevation to the sole provider of light craft to audacity and daring, Aopoa cemented their position thanks to the innovative dual-vector thruster technology that has revolutionized their ship design.

Localization.Name: Fuse
Localization.Description: This safety device provides protection to relays and other power systems from excessive current. Once tripped, fuses need to be replaced before normal operation can resume.
